title: Eva Tow
compiled_truth: Eva Tow is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-29 to 2002-05-06), Eva Tow sent 4 and received 17 emails, totalling 21 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (2), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (2), [Raul Davila](people/raul-davila) (1), [Vkamins](people/vkamins) (1), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (1).
